chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 921 of 2025 CP D 922 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.1, 2, 14 & 22. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4938/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 11.03.2025 Mr. Ali Nawaz Khuhawar, advocate for the petitioners. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate files Vakalatnama in both the petitions on behalf of the respondent and comments in CP D 922 of 2025, which are taken on record. Learned counsel for the respondent points out that these petitions are premature and have been filed in reply of pre-suspension notices as such no actionable order has been passed and/or any grievance has arose. Counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioners do not press petitions for the time being, however, subject to rights of the petitioner to avail remedy, if so advised. Petitions are disposed of accordingly. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
